title: 100PCS Round Cable Clips, 4MM Electrical Cable Wall Clip Cable Nail Clips Management, Wire Tidy Clips Pins Cable Tacks for Ethernet, Electrical Cables, Wires
features: Compact Size: Black round profile and small size, simple and stylish, make it not easy to notice even if it is used in the wall of the living room. A pack with 100 pcs cable clips. Suitable for cables with a diameter of 4mm or less. Enough to organize many cables of home or office.

Premium Quality Materials: Our round cable clips are made of environmental protection PE material, Weather Resistant, Impact Resistant, Corrosion Resistant, good insulation and not easy aging. The cable clips also uses high performance steel nail, durable and sturdiness.

Easy to Use and Install: The installation steps of the wire clip is very simple, just use a hammer to nail them to the wall or other, then you will get a neat, comfortable and safe environment. The cable clips can be nailed into cement wall.

Organized & Tidy: As a useful tools with various size, it’s ideal for home and office various cable management. It will keep your children and pets from hurting by messy cables. And provide you a cleaner and safer living space.
Widely applicable: These durable cable clips can be provide secure fixation for LMR 200 coax cable, BT3002, 7 to 11 AWG speaker wire, phone wire, USB cable, etc. No matter indoor or outdoor.
description: Cable nail clips allow you to secure runs of round cables like coax to walls and floorboards for a cleaner look and prevent tripping over loose cables. Just use a hammer to nail then to your mounting surface, and it will make your table clean and look beautiful. Specifications: Material: PE+Metal Color:Black Size: 4mm How to Use: 1. Put the wire into the round plastic. 2. Hammer the mounting nails into the mounting surface. 3. Repeatedly hammer the nail until it is fixed. Warm tips: - Please be careful of your hand when you use the hammer to knock the nails into the wall. Package included: (100 pcs) 100 x 4mm Black Cable Nail Clips
